titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 22: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 22. (A.R. No. 234A of 1911.) KUMBHAKŌṆAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north and west walls of the central shrine, Nāgēśvara temple.

p.hi: Year 5, Āni, [su] 5 Mūla, Friday: = 975 A.D. June 16.

summary.p: Records that the Mūlaparaḍai-perumakkaḷ of Tirukkuḍamukkil, a dēvadānam, in Pāmbūr-nāḍu on the northern bank (of the river Kāvēri) received 20 kāśu from a lady Madēvan Kaṇḍi, a servant maid of the Palace-establishment of (the queen) Kaṟṟaḷi-Pirāṭṭiyār of Tañjāvūr in Tañjāvūr-kūṟṟam and sold a quarter vēli of land for the maintenance of a person including his clothing who was appointed to bring a pot of water from the (river) Kāvēri thrice a day for the sacred bath of the deity. The ūr-kaṇakku wrote the sale-deed at the behest of mūlaparuḍaipperumakkaḷ.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 131.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu Ivvāṇṭānit tiṅkaḷ matināṭpakkam pañcami nāḷ mūlattu kiḻamai veḷḷi poḻutu muṉkoḷkuṟi Ituvāṇṭitu tiṅkaḷitu pakkam Itu poḻu(tu) titu paruvamāka vaṭakaraip pāmpūr nāṭṭut tevatāṉan tirukuṭamukkil mulaparaṭaipperumakkaḷoṅ keṭṭa nila vilaiyāvaṇan tanta Ivvūrk kuṟṟattuivvūrk kūṟṟattutt tañcāvūrk ka
ṟṟaḷippirāṭṭiyār veḷattup peṇṭāṭṭi mātevan(ṅ) kaṇṭi tirukkiḻkkoṭṭattup paramasvāmikku vaitta tiruma(ā)ñcaṇattukku Ivaḷiṭaik koṇṭa kācu 2 10 Ikkācu Irupatuṅ koṇṭu Em perumāṉukkuk kāviriyiṉiṉṟum potu kalanir koṇṭu muṉṟu sandhiyun tirumañcaṉaniraṭṭuvāṉukku bhogamāka Āvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu kaḻaniyil Ariyalūp patiṟṟu veli
yil nāṉmāk kūṟiṭṭil Aḷantu kāṟcey viṟṟukkuṭuttataṟ kellai kiḻpārkkellai Ipparamasvāmi nilattukkey meṟkkun teṉpāṟk kellai ṟuk key vaṭakkum melpārkkellaiyum parama tta ḻakku llaiyum paramasvāmik teṟkumāka I tta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷaka Aḷantu vantapaṭi kāṟceyyum viṟṟu vilai
ñ ceytu kuṭuttu Ikkācirupatu māvaṇakkaḷatte cellap poruḷaṟak koṇṭu candrādittaval tirumañcaṉamuṭṭāme tiru Ikkācu Irupatum Emperumāṉ śrībhaṇḍarattey vait poṉta svāmibhoga(m)ñ tirumañcana niraṭṭuvāṉukkuk kappaṭattukkuṅ ko kumāka Innilaṅkālum Āvaṇañ ceytu vi
kkuṭuttom meṟcollappaṭṭa kaṟṟaḷippirāṭṭiyār veḷattup peṇṭāṭṭi ṇṭikku mulaparaṭaipperumakkaḷom tuḷ ḷāvaṇak kiḻavaruḷ mulaparaṭaipperumakkaḷ paṇiyāl Innilavilaiyāvaṇa meḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr Ūrkkaṇakkuc ceykinṟaincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
